title: Brazilian-Style Pork Ribs
description: A flavorful and tender pork ribs dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine. The sweet and spicy marinade, combined with the slow cooking process, makes these ribs perfect for a special occasion or a casual gathering.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together oregano, bread crumbs, and stir-fry sauce.
Add the pork ribs to the marinade and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the ribs from the marinade and place them on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil.
Bake the ribs for 2 hours or until tender.
Brush the ribs with fry oil and return to the oven.
Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Let the ribs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
